title: hieracium acrovillosum
intro: Hieracium acrovillosum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, eczema, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium acrovillosum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
